features.description: Scan the full Lenny archive for story-rich episodes. Use mcp__lennysdata__list_content with content_type='podcast' at offsets 0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 250. Then content_type='newsletter' at offsets 0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 250, 300. For each batch, flag episodes/articles that have SPECIFIC STORIES with SPECIFIC NUMBERS — not generic advice. Note title, guest, and why it has song potential. DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/01-archive-scan.md exists with 30+ flagged candidates. NOT TOUCH: any code files, any existing content outside batch2/. VERIFY: file exists, has 30+ candidates, each with title + guest + reason flagged.
steps: Run mcp__lennysdata__list_content for podcasts at 6 offsets
Run mcp__lennysdata__list_content for newsletters at 7 offsets
Flag 30+ candidates with title, guest, song potential reason

features.description: Deep-read top 30 candidates from Task 1. For each, use mcp__lennysdata__read_excerpt to find: a specific turning-point moment, concrete numbers (growth rates, revenue, users, time periods), emotionally resonant quotes, and whether it's Lenny-specific (not generic startup Twitter). Rate each 1-5 on: Story power, Singability, Educational value, Emotional resonance, Lenny-specificity. DO NOT repeat batch 1 topics (PMF, tarpit, taste, 11-star, talk to users, shipping, vibe coding, imposter, burnout, doing things that don't scale). DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/02-deep-reads.md exists with 30 rated candidates. NOT TOUCH: code files, batch 1 content. VERIFY: file has 30 entries each with 5 ratings and total score.
steps: Read Task 1 output for candidate list

features.description: Identify thematic gaps across the 4 albums. Batch 1 covers: Founders (scaling, PMF, pivoting), Product (taste, craft, user research), Builders (shipping, vibe coding), Human Side (imposter, burnout). For each album, identify 3-4 missing themes and search archive for the strongest episode on each. Examples: Founders missing fundraising/pricing/first-hire. Product missing prioritization/saying-no/metrics. Builders missing eng-design tension/tech-debt. Human Side missing career-transitions/leadership/meaning. DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/03-thematic-gaps.md exists with gaps per album + best episode for each gap. NOT TOUCH: code files. VERIFY: file covers all 4 albums, each with 3+ gaps and a specific episode recommendation per gap.
steps: Search archive for best episode per gap

features.description: Find hidden gems — episodes that most subscribers haven't listened to but would make incredible songs. Search for: 'surprising' 'counterintuitive' 'unexpected' 'wrong' 'mistake' 'failure' 'almost quit'. Look for less-known guests with breakthrough stories. Look for Lenny's own personal/vulnerable moments. Look for debates where two experts disagree. Goal: 5-10 episodes that are underrated but emotionally powerful. DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/04-hidden-gems.md exists with 5-10 hidden gem episodes, each with the specific story and why it's song-worthy. NOT TOUCH: code files. VERIFY: file has 5-10 entries, each with episode title, guest, the specific story, and why it's a hidden gem.
steps: Search for less-known guests with breakthrough stories

features.description: Pick the 10 BEST candidates for batch 2 from all research (Tasks 1-4). For each: song title idea, source episode/article + guest, album assignment (Founders/Product/Builders/Human Side), the specific story (2-3 sentences), the chorus hook idea, key numbers to weave in, best verbatim quote, why it works as music, vocal style suggestion (male/female + genre + mood), and score (Story + Singability + Educational + Emotional + Lenny-specific = Total). Rank by total. Ensure at least 2 per album. DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/05-final-candidates.md exists with 10 ranked candidates. NOT TOUCH: code files. VERIFY: file has exactly 10 candidates, each with all fields, ranked by score, 2+ per album.
steps: Write detailed brief for each with all required fields
Rank by total score, ensure album balance

features.description: Deep source material extraction for top 10 candidates. For each of the 10 songs from Task 5, use mcp__lennysdata__read_content (full content, not just excerpt) to extract: the full story arc (beginning/middle/end), every specific number mentioned, every quotable line, the emotional turning point, and connections to other Lenny episodes. This is the raw material for writing lyrics. DONE: content/brainstorm/batch2/06-source-material.md exists with deep extracts for all 10 candidates. NOT TOUCH: code files. VERIFY: file has 10 sections, each with story arc + numbers + quotes + turning point + connections.
steps: Use mcp__lennysdata__read_content for each source episode
Extract story arc, numbers, quotes, turning point, connections
